segments.text: Whether they can close this percent gap and turn this into a close battle
segments.original_text: このパーセンテージ差を埋めて激戦に持っていくことができるかどうかという展開

segments.text: And at aerial neutral they went for the airdodge
segments.original_text: 空中ニュートラルで回避をしてしまって

full_text: Whether they can close this percent gap and turn this into a close battle And at aerial neutral they went for the airdodge
